rows.theorem_variable: H_e in {-1, 0, 1} under each environment-conditional P_g
rows.confidence_level: component alpha split equally between one-sided p+ upper and p- lower bounds
rows.environment_multiplicity: one registered component per required target environment
rows.exact_interval_implementation: exact_discrete_risk_certificate with one-sided Clopper-Pearson multinomial marginal bounds
rows.missing_cell_treatment: unsupported target environment receives radius zero and forces deployment abstention
rows.identity_treatment: identity defines paired harm and is counted only when it is a selectable deployment candidate

rows.confidence_level: component alpha split equally over source-class one-sided recall bounds
rows.attacker_multiplicity: one registered component per attacker in the locked portfolio
rows.source_class_multiplicity: two one-sided Clopper-Pearson bounds per balanced leakage component
rows.missing_cell_treatment: missing source class raises an error and excludes balanced-leakage certification
rows.identity_treatment: identity follows the same attacker contract if it is selectable

rows.theorem_variable: intersection of every contract for one of M fixed candidate edits
rows.data_source: independent certification streams selected without using their outcomes
rows.candidate_multiplicity: union bound over candidates only; no union bound over IUT components
rows.source_class_multiplicity: handled inside each balanced leakage component
rows.exact_interval_implementation: candidate-wise intersection-union test over exact component bounds
rows.missing_cell_treatment: any required unsupported component prevents EDIT

rows.theorem_variable: E_hat_e over target profile gamma_g and source profile eta_s
rows.data_source: the same registered certification components used to build simultaneous curves
rows.range: all finite profile coordinates at least 1 within gamma_cap
rows.environment_multiplicity: every registered environment curve is simultaneous
rows.attacker_multiplicity: every registered attacker curve is simultaneous
rows.source_class_multiplicity: each leakage curve splits its local error over classes 0 and 1
rows.exact_interval_implementation: simultaneous exact discrete upper curves inverted over the full profile continuum
rows.missing_cell_treatment: unsupported dimensions are excluded and deployment_common_radius is zero
rows.identity_treatment: identity is included in family_size only when it is a selectable edit

rows.theorem_variable: Q_g in Q_gamma_g(P_g) and Q_s in Q_eta_s(P_s)
rows.data_source: outcome-independent external metadata design fold and finite validation reference law
rows.range: nonnegative normalized density ratios with declared finite cap
rows.confidence_level: deterministic membership verification; no statistical error budget
rows.candidate_multiplicity: one shared shift law is evaluated on every locked candidate
rows.environment_multiplicity: exact conditional cap logged for every reference environment
rows.attacker_multiplicity: the same shift law is used for every attacker
rows.source_class_multiplicity: exact conditional cap logged for source classes 0 and 1
rows.missing_cell_treatment: design cells absent from reference support cannot be selected
